name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). (1) deterministic CLI tool library (wpx-* scripts) handles all bookkeeping including the new wpx-journal seed-plan / mark-plan-item / add-plan-item subcommands; (2) executor agent owns Steps 1-7 (worktree → Step 1.5 plan generation → Red-Green-Blue → docs → lint → commit → push) and delegates bookkeeping to wpx-* tools; (3) calling session owns Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash, security-reviewer Agent spawn, and wpx-step12 atomic wrap. v0.10.1 fixes the wpx-* tool discoverability gap that blocked downstream-project invocation: every agent / skill prompt now begins with a path-resolution preamble that finds the scripts in the Claude Code plugin cache (~/.claude/plugins/cache/sulis-ai-agents/sulis-execution/<version>/scripts/) and captures the location as $WPX_DIR for every subsequent invocation; ships a `wpx` human-convenience wrapper that users symlink to PATH for ad-hoc manual use. The Step 1.5 plan is the executor's pre-execution audit surface — it reads the WP file + TDD + ADRs, derives an approach summary + structured item list, writes to the journal's ## Plan section, then works through items pending → in-progress → done during Steps 2-7. Scope-guard fires at Step 1.5 if any plan item references files outside the WP Contract. Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
